suggested_fixes: If performance critical, check contiguity with .is_contiguous() and only call .contiguous() when needed.
Explicitly set CUDA device if multi-GPU support is required.
warnings: Uses .contiguous() which may create unnecessary copies; consider ensuring tensors are already contiguous or using non-copying access.
Kernel launches use default CUDA stream; no explicit stream synchronization is performed other than implicit PyTorch synchronization.
